title: Shaadi.com Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Shaadi.com Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shaadi.com Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Shaadi.com Global Group:
Shaadi.com Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com Global Group!
